notes: Core mechanics work (movement, shooting, collision, waves) but aliens are plain white rectangles with no sprite detail, only 15 aliens in a 3x5 grid instead of classic 5x11, no shields/barriers, and the edge-detection movement logic causes aliens to reverse mid-step rather than cleanly at boundaries.
A functional but extremely barebones prototype; missing bunkers, UFOs, intra-wave speedups, and uses plain white rectangles instead of actual sprites.
Core loop and controls work, but it is a very simplified Space Invaders with plain rectangles, no shields/UFO/formation logic, and a questionable wave-timer progression implemented inside render.
